query:
SELECT
                f.user_one_id,
                f.user_two_id,
                f.requested_by,
                f.status AS "status!: FriendStatus",
                f.created_at,
                f.updated_at,
                u.username AS friend_name
                FROM friend f
                JOIN users u ON u.id = CASE
                    WHEN f.user_one_id = $1 THEN f.user_two_id
                    ELSE f.user_one_id
                END
                WHERE (f.user_one_id = $1 OR f.user_two_id = $1)
                    AND f.status = 'accepted'
